invite.title: Invite people
invite.collapsedHint: Share the code or claim links for planned hands
invite.codeUnavailable: The circle code is not available right now.

requests.waitingGrant_one: {{count}} waiting · approve to grant a hand
requests.waitingGrant_other: {{count}} waiting · approve to grant a hand
requests.structureLocked: Structure locked — cannot approve after start
requests.structureLockedBody: Join and additional-hand requests cannot be approved after the circle has started.
requests.approvedBody: The member has been approved and added to the circle.
requests.declineBody: Decline the pending request for {{name}}? No workspace access or financial hand will be granted.

hands.title: Hands
hands.membersHint: Expand to claim, reorder, or inspect hands
hands.requestCircleA11y: Request an additional hand in this circle
hands.modalBody: Each hand is a separate contribution and payout slot (max 3). The organizer must approve Hand 2 / Hand 3 requests.
hands.requestSentBody: Your additional-hand request is waiting for organizer approval. It will not become active until approved.
hands.pendingBody: Hand {{number}} is waiting for organizer approval.
hands.plannedHint: Planned hands become live contribution positions after start.

setup.claimedHint: Claimed hands have workspace access. Unclaimed hands may stay as cash-managed positions at Start.
setup.startBody: Starting locks membership, hands, and payout order.
setup.startBodyUnclaimed: Starting locks membership, hands, and payout order. You will confirm unclaimed hands first.

nextAction.addPlannedMembers: Add planned members so the circle has 2 or more hands.
nextAction.refreshInvite: Refresh the circle and share the invite code when it appears.
nextAction.reviewJoins: Approve or decline pending join requests.
nextAction.shareClaims: Share claim invites for unclaimed hands, or keep them unclaimed for cash management at Start.
nextAction.reviewExtraHands: Approve or decline Hand 2 / Hand 3 requests.
nextAction.addTwoHands: Add planned members until there are 2 or more hands.
nextAction.confirmAmount: Confirm contribution amount on the circle detail.
nextAction.addBeforeOrdering: Add planned hands before ordering payouts.
nextAction.reorderEveryHand: Reorder hands so every participating hand appears exactly once.
nextAction.confirmPayout: Review positions, then confirm the payout order in the Start Circle flow.
nextAction.completePayout: Complete the payout order structure first.
nextAction.reviewThenStart: Review and confirm payout order, then start the circle.
nextAction.fallback: Locks membership, hands, and payout order. Contributions begin after start.

start.confirmPayout: Confirm the payout order before starting.
start.confirmUnclaimed: Confirm you will manage unclaimed hands, or share claim invites first.
start.startedBody: Contributions are now active and the payout order is locked.
start.unclaimedBody_one: {{count}} planned hand does not have a connected workspace member. You can share a claim invite first or explicitly manage this position.
start.unclaimedBody_other: {{count}} planned hands do not have connected workspace members. You can share claim invites first or explicitly manage these positions.
start.confirmBody: Starting locks membership, participating hands, and payout order. Contribution obligations begin according to the saved schedule.

block.alreadyStarted: This circle has already been started or completed.
block.pendingJoin: Approve or decline all pending join requests before starting.
block.pendingExtra: Approve or decline all pending additional-hand requests before starting.
block.minimumHands: A circle needs at least 2 participating hands before it can start.
block.payoutOrder: The payout order must include every participating hand.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
